purpose: Lightweight baseline inventory for the 10-round governance workflow before expensive full-repository gates run.

aiflowTasks.title: RPC Tier-1 closeout
aiflowTasks.objective: Strengthen RPC release-train evidence while keeping latency parity claims conservative until resolver, balancer, stream, benchmark, and rollback data can support Tier 1 promotion.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: P10 release-train RPC closeout evidence for unary, stream, resolver, balancer, deadline, retry, auth, tracing, Kitex rollback, and Tier 1 promotion blockers.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after RPC boundary evidence and targeted RPC tests pass

aiflowTasks.title: goctl generator fidelity
aiflowTasks.objective: Improve goctl-compatible scaffold trust with deterministic regeneration, diff categories, .api and proto import edge cases, generated smoke fixtures, and rollback notes.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: P10 goctl generator fidelity contract linking historical fixtures, generated upgrade dry-run evidence, repeat generation, dependency boundaries, and rollback escalation.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after generated upgrade evidence and generator tests pass

aiflowTasks.title: Storage and cache productization
aiflowTasks.objective: Close go-zero sqlx/cache gaps around read/write strategy, transaction examples, generated model cache contracts, Redis/cache observability, and local smoke tests.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: P10 DB/cache productization rows for SQL, Redis, generated model cache, transactions, observability, dependency isolation, smoke evidence, and rollback paths.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after storage/cache gates and targeted tests pass

aiflowTasks.title: REST middleware ecosystem matrix
aiflowTasks.objective: Make JWT, CORS, CSRF, session, Prometheus, OpenTelemetry, SSE, and WebSocket middleware coverage migratable from go-zero and Gin-style services.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: P10 REST middleware ecosystem closeout linking example assets, migration boundaries, smoke gates, OpenAPI evidence, observability, and rollback notes.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after middleware evidence and REST/API smoke gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Discovery adapter matrix
aiflowTasks.objective: Move discovery from abstraction to adapter evidence across memory, static, DNS, Kubernetes, Consul, Nacos, and etcd behavior boundaries.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: P10 discovery adapter closeout for provider classification, smoke evidence, dependency triggers, fallback behavior, promotion boundaries, and rollback escalation.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after discovery matrix and targeted discovery tests pass

aiflowTasks.title: AI-native support bundle
aiflowTasks.objective: Turn support bundle, doctor/release JSON, governance dashboard fields, control-plane snapshots, and remediation hints into an adopter workflow.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: P10 support bundle closeout linking doctor, release check, bug bundle, AI control-plane, generated failure reports, next actions, redaction, and handoff boundaries.

aiflowTasks.title: Performance budget ratchet
aiflowTasks.objective: Promote only benchmark rows with enough trend confidence while keeping weak-signal REST/RPC latency rows report-only.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: P10 benchmark ratchet closeout for blocking allocation budgets, report-only latency surfaces, unsupported gateway/cache candidates, sample rules, and rollback policy.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after benchmark evidence and regression gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Cloud-native adoption proof
aiflowTasks.objective: Connect cloud-native rendering evidence, reference app topology, runtime SLOs, and adopter rollback notes into one production adoption proof.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: P10 cloud-native adoption proof linking rendered assets, production-orders topology, runtime SLO evidence, rollback drills, production check gates, and fallback policy.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after cloud-native, reference app, and runtime SLO gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: Release dashboard consumption
aiflowTasks.objective: Expose release readiness, API tiers, security, coverage, benchmark ratchets, and aiflow task status as stable adopter-facing dashboard fields.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: P10 release dashboard consumption contract with stable fields, consumer rows, required gates, current .aiflow state consumption, and runtime-state exclusion policy.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after governance report and required-check drift gates pass

aiflowTasks.title: P10 convergence report
aiflowTasks.objective: Close the P10 governance batch by recording traceable task artifacts, gates, commits, known risks, ignored runtime paths, and follow-up ordering without committing runtime state.
aiflowTasks.deliverable: Final P10 convergence report with per-task commits, gate evidence, runtime ignored paths, known risks, and next-round recommendations.
aiflowTasks.commitPolicy: commit after convergence gate passes or environment-limited failures are documented

timeoutPolicy.fallback: Use governance-boundary-inventory-check for Round 01 evidence before running full go test ./...
